name: HMS Neil Mackay (FY 259)
events: 14 Jun 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted exercises off Stornoway with HMS Kingston Peridot (A/Skr.Lt. J.T. Denoon, RNR). These included a practice attack on the trawler, A/S exercises and an exercise by the boarding party of the trawler. Later on this day the submarine carried out A/S exercises with HMS Neil Mackay (Skr. T. Normandale, RNR). (1)

15 Jun 1944 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted exercises off Stornoway with HMS Kingston Peridot (A/Skr.Lt. J.T. Denoon, RNR) and HMS Neil Mackay (Skr. T. Normandale, RNR). These included attack and A/S exercises. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
